svg.font-family: Segoe UI, "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.text: Microsoft Teams bot · Azure-hosted · AskAT&T LLM · AT&T tenant

g.text: USERS (Aara channel members, project leads, exec stakeholders)
Microsoft Purview · sensitivity labels & DLP applied to Aara content
Microsoft Defender for Cloud Apps · session policy + alerts
Microsoft 365 Search / M365 Copilot (v2+) · BCLM-wide retrieval surface
post Adaptive Cards · write to Planner / SharePoint / Outlook
AZURE TENANT (AT&T subscription · Region: East US 2 primary, West US 3 DR)
Hub VNet · Private Endpoints · NSGs · Managed Identity
Azure Front Door + WAF · global ingress, TLS termination, rate limiting (only required for admin web UI in v2)
AskAT&T inference · HTTPS over Private Link / ExpressRoute
AT&T NETWORK (AskAT&T enterprise LLM platform · inside AT&T AI boundary)
Structured-output inference for extraction (action items, decisions, follow-ups, TL;DR)
Single pinned model + version per Aara release · AT&T-approved model catalog
Optional embeddings endpoint for semantic search in Azure AI Search
AT&T-internal authentication · no public Internet path
Connectivity: ExpressRoute, Private Link, or AT&T VNet peering
Rate limits / quotas governed by AskAT&T policy; reserved capacity for the < 30s SLO

svg.text: Trust boundaries shown as dashed-stroke zones. Internal arrows omitted in this view — see Data-flow diagram (page 3) for the full sequence.
